  <!-- Segmenter Polyfill -->

    if (!window.Intl || !window.Intl.Segmenter) {
      (function() {
        var script = document.createElement('script');
        script.src = 'https://static.parastorage.com/unpkg/@formatjs/intl-segmenter@11.7.10/polyfill.iife.js';
        document.head.appendChild(script);
      })();
    }
  </script>

  <!-- Performance API Polyfills -->
  <script>
  (function () {
    var noop = function noop() {};
    if ("performance" in window === false) {
      window.performance = {};
    }
    window.performance.mark = performance.mark || noop;
    window.performance.measure = performance.measure || noop;
    if ("now" in window.performance === false) {
      var nowOffset = Date.now();
      if (performance.timing && performance.timing.navigationStart) {
        nowOffset = performance.timing.navigationStart;
      }
      window.performance.now = function now() {
        return Date.now() - nowOffset;
      };
    }
  })();
  </script>

  <script>window.viewerModel = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('wix-essential-viewer-model').textContent)</script>

  <!-- Globals Definitions -->
  <script>
    (function () {
      var now = Date.now()
      var activationStart = 0
      if (window.viewerModel && window.viewerModel.experiments && window.viewerModel.experiments['specs.thunderbolt.adjustForPrerenderActivation']) {
        try {
          var navEntry = performance.getEntriesByType('navigation')[0];
          if (navEntry && navEntry.activationStart > 0) {
            activationStart = navEntry.activationStart;
          }
        } catch (e) {}
      }
      window.initialTimestamps = {
        initialTimestamp: now,
        // initialRequestTimestamp approximates when the navigation started.
        // activationStart is added to account for prerendered pages: the page may have been
        // created well before the user actually navigated, and activationStart marks when
        // the prerendered page was activated (made visible). Adding it shifts timeOrigin
        // forward to reflect the real navigation time. For non-prerendered pages activationStart is 0.
        initialRequestTimestamp: Math.round(performance.timeOrigin ? performance.timeOrigin + activationStart : now - performance.now() + activationStart)
      }

      window.thunderboltTag = "libs-releases-GA-local"
      window.thunderboltVersion = "1.17079.0"
    })();
  </script>

  <script>
    window.commonConfig = viewerModel.commonConfig

      <link rel="stylesheet" media="print" href="//static.parastorage.com/services/wix-header/5f10f445c9954ea3ed77cf0067a2ab1d76c0cd67f393d3b46585abc9/app.min.css" onload="this.onload=null;this.rel='stylesheet';this.media='all'">
<script id="wix-header-script" defer src="//static.parastorage.com/services/wix-header/5f10f445c9954ea3ed77cf0067a2ab1d76c0cd67f393d3b46585abc9/app.bundle.min.js"></script>
<script>
  window.document.getElementById('wix-header-script').onload = function () {
    window.WixHeader.render({
      isWixSite: true,
      target: document.querySelector('#WIX_HEADER'),
      replaceTarget: true,
      language: document.documentElement.getAttribute('lang') || 'en',
      ...window.WIX_HEADER_CONFIG,
    })
  };
</script>

    
      <link rel="stylesheet" media="print" href="//static.parastorage.com/services/wix-footer/f7de090e8c56774a1f1576a57dacc5fb07cc6a96d4244678709795a8/app.min.css" onload="this.onload=null;this.rel='stylesheet';this.media='all'">
<script id="wix-footer-script" defer src="//static.parastorage.com/services/wix-footer/f7de090e8c56774a1f1576a57dacc5fb07cc6a96d4244678709795a8/app.bundle.min.js"></script>
<script>
  window.document.getElementById('wix-footer-script').onload = function () {
    window.WixFooter.render({
      target: document.querySelector('#WIX_FOOTER'),
      replaceTarget: true,
      language: document.documentElement.getAttribute('lang') || 'en'
    })
  };
</script>

    
      <script src="https://accounts.google.com/gsi/client" async=""></script>
<script>
  (() => {
    const settings = {
      // Studio:
      // redirect: 'https://users.wix.com/signin?studio=true',
      // Logo Maker:
      // redirect: 'https://users.wix.com/signin?color=LOGO&redirectTo=https%3A%2F%2Fmanage.wix.com%2Flogo%2Fmaker%2Fesh%2F',
      // Default:
      redirect: 'https://users.wix.com/signin',
      limit: {
        // desktop: [],
        // tablet: [],
        mobile: ['US']
      }
    }

    const client_id = '352188552355.apps.googleusercontent.com'

    const isLoggedInPromise = isLoggedInUser()

    const fromFactor = getFormFactor()
    const limitedCountries = settings?.limit?.[fromFactor]
    const haslimit = (limitedCountries?.length > 0)
    const countryCodePromise = (haslimit) ? getCountryCode() : null

    window.onload = async function () {
      const [isLoggedIn, countryCode] = await Promise.all([isLoggedInPromise, countryCodePromise])
      if (isLoggedIn) return

      const shouldBlock = (haslimit && !limitedCountries.includes(countryCode))
      if (shouldBlock) return

      window.redirectWithCredential = (response) => {
        const url = `${settings.redirect}#state=googleOT&id_token=${response.credential}`
        window.location = url
      }

      const promptParent = document.createElement('div')
      promptParent.id = 'prompt-parent'
      document.body.appendChild(promptParent)

      google.accounts.id.initialize({
        client_id,
        cancel_on_tap_outside: false,
        callback: redirectWithCredential,
        prompt_parent_id: promptParent.id
      })
      google.accounts.id.prompt()

      fetchModalLoad()
    }

    async function getCountryCode() {
      try {
        const response = await fetch(
          'https://www.wix.com/wix-platform/mkt-apis/_functions/country'
        )
        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error('couldn\'t reach mkt-apis');
        }
        const { countryCode } = await response.json();
        return countryCode;
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error fetching data:', error);
        return null;
      }
    }

    function getFormFactor() {
      const userAgent = navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase()

      if (/mobile|android|iphone|ipod|blackberry|iemobile|opera mini/.test(userAgent)) {
        return 'mobile'
      } else if (/ipad|tablet|playbook|silk/.test(userAgent)) {
        return 'tablet'
      }
      return 'desktop'
    }

    async function isLoggedInUser() {
      const urlObj = new URL(window.location.href)
      const baseUrl = `${urlObj.protocol}//${urlObj.hostname}`
      const response = await fetch(
        baseUrl + '/_api/wix-html-login-webapp/user/getUserDetails',
        {
          method: 'GET',
          headers: { Accept: 'application/json' },
          credentials: 'include',
          cache: 'no-store',
        }
      )

      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error('couldn\'t get user details')
      }

      const userDetails = await response.json()

      return (userDetails.success && userDetails?.payload?.guid)
    }

    function fetchModalLoad() {
      fetch(
        `https://frog.wix.com/hls2?src=6&evid=186&app_url=wix.com&_=${ new Date().getTime() }`,
        {
          method: 'post',
          mode: 'no-cors',
          credentials: 'include',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
          body: '&' + encodeURIComponent('app_url=wix.com')
        }
      )
    }

  })()
</script>

<style>
  #prompt-parent {
    position: fixed;
    z-index: 10000;
  }

  @media (min-width: 769px) {

    /* Desktop */
    #prompt-parent {
      top: 20px;
      right: 20px;
      bottom: auto;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {

    /* Mobile */
    #prompt-parent {
      top: auto;
      right: auto;
      bottom: 0;
    }
  }
</style>

  <script id="wix-skip-played-animations-setup">
    (function() {
        var navEntry = performance.getEntriesByType('navigation')[0];
        if (navEntry && navEntry.type === 'reload') {
            return;
        }
        if ('PageRevealEvent' in window) {
            window.__pageRevealPromise = new Promise(function(resolve) {
                window.addEventListener('pagereveal', resolve, { once: true });
            });
        } else {
            window.__pageRevealPromise = Promise.resolve();
        }
    })();
  </script>

<title>Website Builder - Create a Free Website In Minutes | Wix.com</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Get everything you need to build a website your way. Wix’s free, easy-to-use website builder offers 2,000+ templates, built-in AI tools and a custom domain."/>
  <link rel="canonical" href="https://www.wix.com"/>
  <meta property="og:title" content="Your vision. Your goals. Your website. | Wix.com"/>
  <meta property="og:description" content="Get everything you need to create your website, your way. From an intuitive website builder to built-in business solutions and AI tools—try Wix for free."/>
  <meta property="og:image" content="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/343a2a_f435947596b24c0a87854aa410c4cf48~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_1200,h_630,al_c/343a2a_f435947596b24c0a87854aa410c4cf48~mv2.jpg"/>
  <meta property="og:image:width" content="1200"/>
  <meta property="og:image:height" content="630"/>
  <meta property="og:url" content="https://www.wix.com"/>
  <meta property="og:site_name" content="wix.com"/>
  <meta property="og:type" content="website"/>
  <script type="application/ld+json">{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"HowTo","name":"How to create a website for free","description":"Follow these 7 simple steps to create a website today.","step":[{"@type":"HowToStep","name":"Find a platform","text":"Pick a secure and reliable free website builder like Wix to create, host and manage your site in one place."},{"@type":"HowToStep","name":"Plan your website","text":"Map out your goals, site structure and who your audience is to make sure your business stays on track."},{"@type":"HowToStep","name":"Start creating","text":"Choose from 2,000+ free templates built for every industry or use the AI website builder."},{"@type":"HowToStep","name":"Customize everything","text":"Use the drag and drop editor and built-in AI tools to adjust colors, fonts and animations to reflect your brand."},{"@type":"HowToStep","name":"Optimize for search engines","text":"Set up your site for strong organic visibility with a suite of built-in SEO tools."},{"@type":"HowToStep","name":"Publish your website","text":"Register and connect a domain name, make sure your site looks good on all devices and go live."},{"@type":"HowToStep","name":"Drive traffic","text":"Use built-in marketing tools to create email campaigns, social posts, ads and track analytics."}]}</script>
  <script type="application/ld+json">{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"Organization","name":"Wix.com","legalName":"Wix.com Ltd","url":"https://www.wix.com/","logo":"https://static.wixstatic.com/media/9ab0d1_2ff5ca18550e405ea1844e52afaff120~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_333,h_154,al_c,lg_1,q_80,enc_auto/Wix%20logo%20white%20BG.jpg","sameAs":["https://www.facebook.com/wix","https://twitter.com/wix","https://www.instagram.com/wix","https://www.youtube.com/user/Wix","https://www.linkedin.com/company/wix-com/","https://www.pinterest.com/wixcom/","https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wix.com"],"contactPoint":{"@type":"ContactPoint","contactType":"Customer Support","url":"https://www.wix.com/contact"}}</script>
  <script type="application/ld+json">{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"VideoObject","name":"Wix website builder","description":"Describe what you want and get a unique website in minutes. Refine any detail in a way that feels most natural to you on our flagship AI website builder.","thumbnailUrl":"https://static.wixstatic.com/media/3ae05b_1c71c1a248004af7b976bde648dd44cef002.png/v1/fill/w_799,h_504,al_c,q_90,usm_0.33_1.00_0.00,enc_avif,quality_auto/3ae05b_1c71c1a248004af7b976bde648dd44cef002.png","uploadDate":"2026-02-08T00:00:00Z","duration":"PT73S","contentUrl":"https://video.wixstatic.com/video/3ae05b_1c71c1a248004af7b976bde648dd44ce/480p/mp4/file.mp4"}</script>
  <script type="application/ld+json">{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"FAQPage","mainEntity":[{"@type":"Question","name":"Is it easy to build a website?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Yes. Wix offers a few different ways to create your own free website, so you can choose the creation process that works best for you. Pick from 2000+ designer-made templates, or use our AI website builder to create a business-ready site in no time using a conversational interface. You can also start from scratch using Wix’s drag and drop website builder. Whichever way you choose, you can always continue customizing in the Editor for total website design freedom."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How do I create a website?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Whether you’re selling online, running events or growing a community, here’s how to create your own website in 6 simple steps:  Plan your website. First, think about the type of site you’re creating and your target audience. With that in mind, you can start mapping out the pages you want to incorporate like the “About” and “Contact” pages, perhaps a blog or a photo gallery, and a page for products or services.  Build with AI or choose a template. Chat with our AI website builder about your business and preferences to instantly get a fully functional and customizable website built for you. You can also start by choosing from a variety of templates, all professionally designed with the best site practices in mind.   Customize your website. Whether you start with AI or a template, you can use our intuitive drag and drop editor to customize your site to match your brand. Your site will also be optimized for mobile, but in the editor you have the option to make changes and customize your site’s mobile view.   Get a domain name. When trying to come up with the perfect domain name, you can use Wix to search and register available names, or connect an existing one to your new site.  Optimize for search engines and LLM’s. Use a suite of advanced SEO and AI visibility tools to ensure your site is easy for search engines to crawl and LLMs to understand. Wix gives you powerful SEO and GEO tools to optimize your pages, organize your content clearly and help search engines understand what your site is about.  Publish and promote your website. Once you’re happy with your site, you’re ready to hit ‘publish’ and start gaining traffic. Now’s the time to promote your site with built-in marketing tools and streamline your customer management processes with a smart CRM system.    By following these steps, you'll be able to build a powerful online presence that drives business growth."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"Can I create a website for free?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Yes, with Wix, creating a website is completely free. You can design your site, publish it and share it with the world without spending a dime. It’s a great way to get started and see what’s possible for your ideas.  However, if you’re looking to take things to the next level—like selling products through an online store, using custom domains or removing ads—you’ll need to upgrade to one of our Premium plans. These plans unlock extra features designed to help your business grow."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How can I connect a domain to my website?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"When you create a free website with Wix, it comes with a Wixsite domain name built in (i.e., mysite.wixsite.com). To instantly look more professional, boost your credibility and help visitors find you online, you can also get a new custom domain name, which comes free for a year with the initial purchase of an annual Premium plan. You can choose from a list of domain extensions, such as .com, .net, .org and many more to find the one that’s just right for your site. If you already own a domain name, you can always connect or transfer it to your Wix site."}}]}</script>

  0% { opacity: 0; animation-timing-function: step-end; }
  0.00009999999999999999% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(var(--motion-translate-x), var(--motion-translate-y)) rotate(var(--comp-rotate-z, 0deg)); }
  100% { opacity: var(--comp-opacity, 1); transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(var(--comp-rotate-z, 0deg)); }

<script id="wix-first-paint">
    if (window.ResizeObserver &&
        (!window.PerformanceObserver || !PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes || PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes.indexOf('paint') === -1)) {
        new ResizeObserver(function (entries, observer) {
            entries.some(function (entry) {
                var contentRect = entry.contentRect;
                if (contentRect.width > 0 && contentRect.height > 0) {
                    requestAnimationFrame(function (now) {
                        window.wixFirstPaint = now;
                        dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('wixFirstPaint'));
                    });
                    observer.disconnect();
                    return true;
                }
            });
        }).observe(document.body);
    }
</script>


<script id="scroll-bar-width-calculation">
    const div = document.createElement('div')
    div.style.overflowY = 'scroll'
    div.style.width = '50px'
    div.style.height = '50px'
    div.style.visibility = 'hidden'
    document.body.appendChild(div)
    const scrollbarWidth= div.offsetWidth - div.clientWidth
    document.body.removeChild(div)
    if(scrollbarWidth > 0){
        document.body.style.setProperty('--scrollbar-width', `${scrollbarWidth}px`)
    }
</script>





    <style id=wix-custom-css>/* Users Custom CSS code */
 

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-transparent-video {
  filter: drop-shadow(
    0.35vw   /* offset-x */
    0.45vw   /* offset-y */
    1.1vw    /* blur */
    rgba(50, 48, 126, 0.28)
  );
}
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-aurora-mesh-container {
  width: 100%;
  height: 120%;
  background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27 viewBox=%270 0 1000 1000%27 preserveAspectRatio=%27none%27%3E%3Cdefs%3E%3Cfilter id=%27blur-filter%27 x=%27-100%%27 y=%27-100%%27 width=%27300%%27 height=%27300%%27%3E%3CfeGaussianBlur stdDeviation=%2730%27/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Cfilter id=%27noise-filter%27%3E%3CfeTurbulence type=%27fractalNoise%27 baseFrequency=%270.65%27 numOctaves=%273%27 stitchTiles=%27stitch%27/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3C/defs%3E%3Crect width=%27100%%27 height=%27100%%27 fill=%27%23FFFFFF%27/%3E%3Cellipse cx=%27425.1%27 cy=%27108.0%27 rx=%27277.6%27 ry=%27255.0%27 fill=%27%23caf39c%27 opacity=%271.00%27 filter=%27url(%23blur-filter)%27 style=%27mix-blend-mode:normal%27/%3E%3Cellipse cx=%27105.7%27 cy=%27170.0%27 rx=%27193.6%27 ry=%27340.0%27 fill=%27%23b4b3ff%27 opacity=%270.72%27 filter=%27url(%23blur-filter)%27 style=%27mix-blend-mode:normal%27/%3E%3Cellipse cx=%27195.3%27 cy=%27798.1%27 rx=%27331.7%27 ry=%27410.0%27 fill=%27%23d9c0ff%27 opacity=%270.70%27 filter=%27url(%23blur-filter)%27 style=%27mix-blend-mode:normal%27/%3E%3Cellipse cx=%271145.9%27 cy=%27330.0%27 rx=%27485.9%27 ry=%27480.0%27 fill=%27%239db1f1%27 opacity=%271.00%27 filter=%27url(%23blur-filter)%27 style=%27mix-blend-mode:normal%27/%3E%3Cellipse cx=%27292.4%27 cy=%27505.5%27 rx=%27500.0%27 ry=%27485.0%27 fill=%27%2369a2e0%27 opacity=%270.70%27 filter=%27url(%23blur-filter)%27 style=%27mix-blend-mode:normal%27/%3E%3Cellipse cx=%27944.3%27 cy=%27930.7%27 rx=%27200.0%27 ry=%27200.0%27 fill=%27%23F7B3E3%27 opacity=%270.54%27 filter=%27url(%23blur-filter)%27 style=%27mix-blend-mode:normal%27/%3E%3Cellipse cx=%27544.4%27 cy=%27872.3%27 rx=%27246.7%27 ry=%27335.0%27 fill=%27%230b27b7%27 opacity=%270.24%27 filter=%27url(%23blur-filter)%27 style=%27mix-blend-mode:normal%27/%3E%3Crect width=%27100%%27 height=%27100%%27 filter=%27url(%23noise-filter)%27 opacity=%270.14%27 style=%27mix-blend-mode:overlay%27/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
  background-size: cover;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: center;
  /* filter: blur(20px); */
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-main-cta:focus {
  --focus-ring-box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #14245A;
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-shadow-style-image{
  box-shadow: 0px 13.01px 28.63px 0px rgba(91, 114, 197, 0.39);
  border-radius: 1vw;
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-shadow-style-image-wrap {
  filter: drop-shadow(
    0px 8px 18px rgba(91, 114, 197, 0.3)
  );
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-bubble-text-aria{
  width: max-content;
  box-shadow:
    -10.2px 7.65px 25.5px -7.65px rgba(225, 232, 248, 1),
     10.2px 17.85px 40.2px -7.65px rgba(215, 222, 243, 0.6);
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-aria-sm-bubble-shadow {
  box-shadow: -3.128px 3.076px 8.432px -0.894px #BECBFF, -4.437px 4.067px 18.486px -6.285px rgba(206, 255, 126, 0.50);
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-add-image-shadow {
  border-radius: 8.7px;
  box-shadow: 3.286px 79.952px 23px 0 rgba(50, 48, 126, 0.00), 2.19px 51.476px 20.81px 0 rgba(50, 48, 126, 0.02), 1.095px 24.095px 17.524px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04), 0 13.143px 13.143px 0 rgba(50, 48, 126, 0.05), 0 3.286px 6.571px 0 rgba(50, 48, 126, 0.11);
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-hero-main-image-shadow picture{
box-shadow: 7.859px 79.717px 48.279px 0 rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.05), 3.368px 35.929px 35.929px 0 rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.09), 1.123px 8.982px 19.087px 0 rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.10);
}


 /* ===== Gradient animated text (Rich Text) aria-videos-section  ===== */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-gradient-text-animate {
  filter: none;
  background: linear-gradient(
    106deg,
    #2C34AF 0%,
    rgba(206, 255, 126, 0.75) 50%,
    #2C34AF 100%
  );

  background-size: 300% 100%;
  background-position: 0% 50%;

  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;

  animation: gradientTextWave 10s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes gradientTextWave {
  0% {
    background-position: 0% 50%;
  }
  50% {
    background-position: 100% 50%;
  }
  100% {
    background-position: 0% 50%;
  }
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-faq-container { z-index: 500; }

/* Increase z-index when the container or any of its children are focused to ensure it appears above other elements */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-closer-container:focus-within { z-index: 10000; }

/* Gradient background to the template's hover container */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-templates-hover-container { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0%, #00000098 100%); }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-templates-hover-container:focus-within { opacity: 1;  }
/* Padding right to the last template item.templates-repeater .repeater__item:last-child { padding-right: 10vw !important; } */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-marginRight {
    padding-right: 5vw !important; 
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-gradientGreen{
  z-index: 1000;
}

/* Hide and show animations for the arrows in both the editor and the dashboard sections */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-editor-section-arrow-show, #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-dashboard-section-arrow-show { width: 1.3vw; height: 0.9vw; margin-right: 0.8vw; margin-left: 0.4vw; transition: all 0.3s ease-in-out;}
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-editor-section-arrow-hide, #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-dashboard-section-arrow-hide { width: 0; height: 0; margin-right: 0vw; overflow: hidden; margin-left: 0vw; transition: all 0.3s ease-in-out;}

/* Hide and show animations for the items content in the business section */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-biz-repeater-opened-item { height: 9.2vw; opacity: 1; visibility: visible; transition: height 0.3s ease-out, opacity 0.2s ease-out 0.2s; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-biz-repeater-closed-item { height: 0; opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; transition: height 0.3s ease-out, opacity 0.2s ease-out; }

/* Arrow rotation animation used both in the Business repeater and in the Market section */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-opened-arrow{ transform: rotate(180deg); transition: all 0.4s ease-in-out; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-closed-arrow{ transform: rotate(0deg); transition: all 0.4s ease-in-out; }

/* Expand and collapse description boxes for the market section */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-market-description-box-expanded { height: 3.7vw; visibility: visible; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.85, 0, 0.15, 1);}
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-market-description-box-collapsed { height: 0; visibility: hidden; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.85, 0, 0.15, 1); }

/* Expand and collapse description boxes for the editor section */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-editor-features-items .wixui-off .wixui-editor-features-item-description { display: none; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-editor-features-items .wixui-active .wixui-editor-features-item-description { display: block; }

/* Adding margin between the bullet number and the text */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol li p { margin-left: 1.2vw; margin-top: 1.2vw; margin-bottom: 1.2vw; }
/* Adding a line under the text bullets execpt for the last bullet */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol li:not(:last-child)::after{ content: ''; width: calc(100% + 1vw); height: 1px; background-color: #747678; display: block; left: -1.3vw; position: relative;}
/* Changing the bullet color */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol li::marker { color: #747678;}


#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-video-rounded-corners div[tabindex='0'] { border-radius: 1vw; overflow: hidden; }

 /* Template filter */

 #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-activeCTA{
    text-decoration-line: underline;
    text-decoration-thickness: 1px;
    text-underline-offset: 0.3em;
     text-decoration-color: #000000;
 }


 #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-repeater div.wixui-itemClass:last-child .wixui-filterLine{
    opacity: 0;
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-selected-filter::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: 15px;
  top: 17px;
  width: 12px;
  height: 4px;
  background-color: transparent;
  border-left: 1px solid black;
  border-bottom: 1px solid black;
  transform: rotate(-45deg);
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-button.wixui-clicked .wixui-button__icon {
  transform: rotate(180deg);
}
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-dropdown__label .wixui-button__label{
   font-size: 0.833vw;
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-categoryBTN .wixui-button__label{
font-size: clamp(14px, 1.04vw, 20px);
}



@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-gradient-text-animate {
    filter: none;
    animation: none;
    background-position: 50% 50%;
  }
}


/* -------------------- Tablet -------------------- */

@media (min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 1099px) {
    #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol li  { padding-top: 3vw; padding-bottom: 3vw;}
    #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol li:not(:last-child)::after{ top: 3vw; left: -2.1vw; }

    #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-biz-repeater-opened-item { height: 58vw; }
    #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-biz-repeater-closed-item { height: 0; padding: 0;}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-editor-section-arrow-show { height:1.7vw; width: 2vw; margin-right: 1.4; } 

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-editor-features-items .wixui-off .wixui-editor-features-item-description { display: none; }
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-editor-features-items .wixui-active .wixui-editor-features-item-description { display: block; }


#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-dashboard-section-arrow-show {height:1vw; width: 2vw; margin-right: 1vw;}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-market-description-box-expanded { height: 9.7vw; }

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-video-rounded-corners div[tabindex='0'] { border-radius: 1.042vw; overflow: hidden; }

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-categoryBTN .wixui-button__label{
font-size: clamp(16px, 1.82vw, 20px);
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-add-image-shadow {
  border-radius: 5px; 
  }
}

/* -------------------- Mobile -------------------- */

@media (max-width: 767px) {
  #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-templates-hover-container { background: unset; }

    #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-transparent-video {
      filter: drop-shadow(
      6px    /* offset-x */
      9px    /* offset-y */
      15px   /* blur */
      rgba(50, 48, 126, 0.24)
    );
  }
  #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol {margin: 0px;}
  #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol li  { padding-top: 4vw; padding-bottom: 4vw;}
  #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-text-bullets ol li:not(:last-child)::after{ bottom: -4vw;  left: -4vw; width: calc(100% + 3vw);}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-editor-features-items .wixui-active,#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-editor-features-items .wixui-off  {animation: unset;}

/* Workaround to add a margin to the last item */
 #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-blog-repeater > div:first-child > div:first-child { width: max-content; } 

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-editor-features-items .wixui-off .wixui-editor-features-item-description, #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-editor-features-items .wixui-active .wixui-editor-features-item-description { margin-top: 3vw; display: block;}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-biz-repeater-opened-item { height: 78vw; }

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-market-description-box-expanded { height: 18vw; }

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-dashboard-section-arrow-show { margin-left:0.4vw; margin-right:2.5vw;  height:2.5vw; width: 3.5vw; transition: all 0.4s ease-in-out; -webkit-transition: all 0.4s ease-in-out;}

/* A Fix for the sticky mobile cta that gets below the faq container */
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope div:has(.wixui-mobile-sticky-container) {z-index: 600 !important;}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-video-rounded-corners div[tabindex='0'] { border-radius: 2.22vw; overflow: hidden; }


#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-order-high {
  z-index: 10;
}
#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-dropdown__label .wixui-button__label{
  font-size: 4.44vw !important;
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-categoryBTN .wixui-button__label{
font-size: 4.44vw !important;
}


}


#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-help-cards-repeater-item1, #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-help-cards-repeater-item2 {
    transition: all 200ms ease-in-out;
    -moz-transition: all 200ms ease-in-out;
    -webkit-transition: all 200ms ease-in-out;
    -o-transition: all 200ms ease-in-out;
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-help-cards-repeater .wixui-repeater__item:hover > div:first-child {
    background-color: #FDFFCB !important;
    border-color: #FDFFCB !important;
}


#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-help-cards-repeater .wixui-repeater__item:hover .wixui-rich-text__text {
    color: #000 !important;
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF#main_MF .css-editing-scope .wixui-help-cards-repeater .wixui-repeater__item:hover path {
    fill: #000 !important;
}

</style>
<style id=custom-css-ccae8471-d686-42ee-9b7b-b8c452e67b21>/* Users Custom CSS code */
 #SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF .css-editing-scope .custom-css-ccae8471-d686-42ee-9b7b-b8c452e67b21 .wixui-button {
    height: 100%;
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF .css-editing-scope .custom-css-ccae8471-d686-42ee-9b7b-b8c452e67b21 .wixui-search-component-wrapper > [data-testid="responsive-container-overflow"] {
  overflow: visible;
}

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF .css-editing-scope .custom-css-ccae8471-d686-42ee-9b7b-b8c452e67b21 .wixui-icon-search-button .wixui-button__label {
  font-family: wix-madefor-text-v2, sans-serif !important;
}


/** Custom Search Widget **/

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF .css-editing-scope .custom-css-ccae8471-d686-42ee-9b7b-b8c452e67b21 .wixui-blks-search-btn .wixui-button__icon {
animation: moving-arrow 1.1s ease infinite alternate;
}  

#SITE_CONTAINER #main_MF .css-editing-scope .custom-css-ccae8471-d686-42ee-9b7b-b8c452e67b21 .wixui-blks-search-btn span:first-child {
    overflow: visible ;
}  


@keyframes moving-arrow {
    0% {
        transform: translateX(0);
    }

    100% {
        transform: translateX(8px);
    }
}</style>



    <!-- domStoreHtml -->
    <svg data-dom-store style="display:none"><defs id="dom-store-defs"></defs></svg>

</span></span></span></a></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m0jekkea" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-m0jekkea-container comp-m0jekkea cwL6XW wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-m0jekkei4" class="comp-m0jekkei4" data-semantic-classname="button"><a data-testid="linkElement" href="https://www.wix.com/blog/how-to-build-website-from-scratch-guide" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="StylableButton2545352419__root style-m0jekkek2__root wixui-button StylableButton2545352419__link" aria-label="Learn more"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__container"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__label wixui-button__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Learn more</span><span class="StylableButton2545352419__icon wixui-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="stylablebutton-icon"><span><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<li class="wixui-rich-text__text">
<p class="font_7 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:madefor-text-bold,helveticaneuew01-65medi,helveticaneuew02-65medi,helveticaneuew10-65medi,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Find a platform. </span>Pick a secure and reliable free website builder like&nbsp;<span style="text-decoration:underline;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://users.wix.com/signin?&postSignUp=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wix.com%2Fnew%2Fintro&postLogin=https%3A%2F%2Fmanage.wix.com%2Faccount%2Fsites&overrideLocale=&loginDialogContext=forgot-password&originUrl=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wix.com&forceRender=true" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Wix</a></span>&nbsp;to create, host and manage your site in one place.</span></p>
</li>
<li class="wixui-rich-text__text">
<p class="font_7 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:madefor-text-bold,helveticaneuew01-65medi,helveticaneuew02-65medi,helveticaneuew10-65medi,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Plan your website.</span> Map out your goals, site structure and who your audience is to make sure your business stays on track.</p>
</li>
<li class="wixui-rich-text__text">
<p class="font_7 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">​<span style="font-family:madefor-text-bold,helveticaneuew01-65medi,helveticaneuew02-65medi,helveticaneuew10-65medi,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Start creating.&nbsp;</span><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">Choose from 2,000+ free templates built for every industry or use the AI website builder.</span></span></p>
</li>
<li class="wixui-rich-text__text">
<p class="font_7 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:madefor-text-bold,helveticaneuew01-65medi,helveticaneuew02-65medi,helveticaneuew10-65medi,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Customize everything. </span>Use the drag and drop editor and built-in AI tools to adjust colors, fonts and animations to reflect your brand.</span></p>
</li>
<li class="wixui-rich-text__text">
<p class="font_7 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:madefor-text-bold,helveticaneuew01-65medi,helveticaneuew02-65medi,helveticaneuew10-65medi,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Optimize for search engines. </span>Set up your site for strong organic visibility with a suite of built-in SEO tools.</span></p>
</li>
<li class="wixui-rich-text__text">
<p class="font_7 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:madefor-text-bold,helveticaneuew01-65medi,helveticaneuew02-65medi,helveticaneuew10-65medi,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Publish your website.</span> Register and connect a domain name, make sure your site looks good on all devices and go live.</span></p>
</li>
<li class="wixui-rich-text__text">
<p class="font_7 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:madefor-text-bold,helveticaneuew01-65medi,helveticaneuew02-65medi,helveticaneuew10-65medi,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Drive traffic.</span> Use built-in marketing tools to create email campaigns, social posts, ads and track analytics.</span></p>
</li>
</ol></div><!--/$--><div style="visibility:hidden;overflow:hidden;pointer-events:none"></div></div></section><!--/$--><!--$--><section id="comp-m0kqvn06" tabindex="-1" </div></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-m0kp0roc4__item-m0kp4qlv" class="comp-m0kp0roc4" data-semantic-classname="button"><a data-testid="linkElement" href="https://www.wix.com/marketplace" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener" class="StylableButton2545352419__root style-m0kp0roe9__root wixui-button StylableButton2545352419__link" aria-label="Hire a pro"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__container"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__label wixui-button__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Hire a pro</span><span class="StylableButton2545352419__icon wixui-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="stylablebutton-icon"><span><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

website?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__da515672-539b-4ec7-aa69-5797613d17fc" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__da515672-539b-4ec7-aa69-5797613d17fc" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" data-bbox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" height="29" width="30" data-type="color" role=presentation aria-hidden=true aria-label="">
    <g>
        <path fill="#000624" d="M16.139 13V0h-2.167v13h-13v2.167h13v13h2.167v-13h13V13h-13Z" clip-rule="evenodd" fill-rule="evenodd" data-color="1"/>

    <g>
        <path d="M108.012 91.953L107.95 20H91.925l.062 71.953H20v16.031h71.988V180l15.963-.062.062-71.953H180V91.953h-71.988z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2__da515672-539b-4ec7-aa69-5797613d17fc" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__da515672-539b-4ec7-aa69-5797613d17fc" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">Yes. Wix offers a few different ways to create your own free website, so you can choose the creation process that works best for you. Pick from 2000+ designer-made templates, or use our <a href="https://www.wix.com/ai-website-builder" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">AI website builder</u></a> to create a business-ready site in no time using a conversational interface. You can also start from scratch using Wix’s <a href="https://www.wix.com/builder/drag-and-drop" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">drag and drop website builder</u>.</a> Whichever way you choose, you can always continue customizing in the Editor for total <a href="https://www.wix.com/website/design" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">website design</u> </a>freedom.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__da515672-539b-4ec7-aa69-5797613d17fc" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">How do I create a website?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" data-bbox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" height="29" width="30" data-type="color" role=presentation aria-hidden=true aria-label="">
    <g>
        <path fill="#000624" d="M16.139 13V0h-2.167v13h-13v2.167h13v13h2.167v-13h13V13h-13Z" clip-rule="evenodd" fill-rule="evenodd" data-color="1"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</div></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6" data-semantic-classname="button"><button type="button" class="StylableButton2545352419__root comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6-styleId__root wixui-button" data-testid="buttonContent" aria-expanded="false" aria-describedby="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" aria-label="Show more"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__container"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__label wixui-button__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Show more</span><span class="StylableButton2545352419__icon wixui-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="stylablebutton-icon"><span><svg data-bbox="20 20 160 160" viewBox="0 0 200 200" height="200" width="200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" data-type="shape">
    <g>
        <path d="M108.012 91.953L107.95 20H91.925l.062 71.953H20v16.031h71.988V180l15.963-.062.062-71.953H180V91.953h-71.988z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">Whether you’re selling online, running events or growing a community, here’s how to create your own website in 6 simple steps:</p>
<ul class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">Plan your website.</strong> First, think about the type of site you’re creating and your target audience. With that in mind, you can start mapping out the pages you want to incorporate like the “About” and “Contact” pages, perhaps a blog or a photo gallery, and a page for products or services.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">Build with AI or choose a template.</strong> Chat with our AI website builder about your business and preferences to instantly get a fully functional and customizable website built for you. You can also start by choosing from a variety of templates, all professionally designed with the best site practices in mind.&nbsp;</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">Customize your website.</strong> Whether you start with AI or a template, you can use our intuitive drag and drop editor to customize your site to match your brand. Your site will also be optimized for mobile, but in the editor you have the option to make changes and customize your site’s mobile view.&nbsp;</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">Get a domain name.</strong> When trying to come up with the perfect domain name, you can use Wix to search and register available names, or connect an existing one to your new site.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">Optimize for search engines and LLM’s.</strong> Use a suite of advanced SEO and AI visibility tools to ensure your site is easy for search engines to crawl and LLMs to understand. Wix gives you powerful SEO and GEO tools to optimize your pages, organize your content clearly and help search engines understand what your site is about.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">Publish and promote your website.</strong> Once you’re happy with your site, you’re ready to hit ‘publish’ and start gaining traffic. Now’s the time to promote your site with built-in marketing tools and streamline your customer management processes with a smart CRM system.</p></li>
</ul>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><br class="wixui-rich-text__text"></p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">By following these steps, you'll be able to build a powerful online presence that drives business growth.</p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><br class="wixui-rich-text__text"></p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__33641a7c-2cbc-4772-823b-b713c116b8c2" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov__9803f853-5405-45c9-b3cf-02461904841b" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__9803f853-5405-45c9-b3cf-02461904841b" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32__9803f853-5405-45c9-b3cf-02461904841b" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">How do I choose the best website builder?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__9803f853-5405-45c9-b3cf-02461904841b" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__9803f853-5405-45c9-b3cf-02461904841b" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" data-bbox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" height="29" width="30" data-type="color" role=presentation aria-hidden=true aria-label="">
    <g>
        <path fill="#000624" d="M16.139 13V0h-2.167v13h-13v2.167h13v13h2.167v-13h13V13h-13Z" clip-rule="evenodd" fill-rule="evenodd" data-color="1"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</div></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__9803f853-5405-45c9-b3cf-02461904841b" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6" data-semantic-classname="button"><button type="button" class="StylableButton2545352419__root comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6-styleId__root wixui-button" data-testid="buttonContent" aria-expanded="false" aria-describedby="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32__9803f853-5405-45c9-b3cf-02461904841b" aria-label="Show more"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__container"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__label wixui-button__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Show more</span><span class="StylableButton2545352419__icon wixui-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="stylablebutton-icon"><span><svg data-bbox="20 20 160 160" viewBox="0 0 200 200" height="200" width="200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" data-type="shape">
    <g>
        <path d="M108.012 91.953L107.95 20H91.925l.062 71.953H20v16.031h71.988V180l15.963-.062.062-71.953H180V91.953h-71.988z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2__9803f853-5405-45c9-b3cf-02461904841b" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__9803f853-5405-45c9-b3cf-02461904841b" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">The best website builder is one that will support your specific needs and business goals. As you research which builder is right for you, here are some important factors to consider:</p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><br class="wixui-rich-text__text"></p>
<ul class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">Ease of use:</strong> Look for a website maker with an intuitive interface. Using a drag and drop editor that includes AI tools can simplify the web design process and make it more efficient.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">Website templates:</strong> Choose a platform that offers a large selection of customizable templates tailored to a variety of industries and business types.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">AI tools: </strong>Look for a builder with AI features that help with more than just design. Wix has AI tools that can create business-specific content like product descriptions and blog posts, generate unique images and even analyze your business data to give you personalized insights for growth.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">Business solutions:</strong> Some website builders include built-in solutions to help you manage and grow your business seamlessly like eCommerce, scheduling, marketing tools and more.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">Security: </strong>It’s important that the website builder you choose offers<strong class="wixui-rich-text__text"> </strong>reliable web hosting with data encryption to protect your and your users’ data.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">Customer support:</strong> Reliable support is crucial. Check what support options your website builder provides, and make sure you’ll be able to get the help you need 24/7.</p></li>
</ul>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><br class="wixui-rich-text__text"></p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">Wix fulfills all these requirements, giving you the tools you need to create a website and confidently run and grow your business all in one place.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__9803f853-5405-45c9-b3cf-02461904841b" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov__30de142a-9e7c-4da5-baee-f32b029ea2cd" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__30de142a-9e7c-4da5-baee-f32b029ea2cd" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32__30de142a-9e7c-4da5-baee-f32b029ea2cd" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">What types of websites can you build on Wix?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__30de142a-9e7c-4da5-baee-f32b029ea2cd" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__30de142a-9e7c-4da5-baee-f32b029ea2cd" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" data-bbox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" height="29" width="30" data-type="color" role=presentation aria-hidden=true aria-label="">
    <g>
        <path fill="#000624" d="M16.139 13V0h-2.167v13h-13v2.167h13v13h2.167v-13h13V13h-13Z" clip-rule="evenodd" fill-rule="evenodd" data-color="1"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</div></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__30de142a-9e7c-4da5-baee-f32b029ea2cd" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6" data-semantic-classname="button"><button type="button" class="StylableButton2545352419__root comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6-styleId__root wixui-button" data-testid="buttonContent" aria-expanded="false" aria-describedby="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32__30de142a-9e7c-4da5-baee-f32b029ea2cd" aria-label="Show more"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__container"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__label wixui-button__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Show more</span><span class="StylableButton2545352419__icon wixui-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="stylablebutton-icon"><span><svg data-bbox="20 20 160 160" viewBox="0 0 200 200" height="200" width="200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" data-type="shape">
    <g>
        <path d="M108.012 91.953L107.95 20H91.925l.062 71.953H20v16.031h71.988V180l15.963-.062.062-71.953H180V91.953h-71.988z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2__30de142a-9e7c-4da5-baee-f32b029ea2cd" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__30de142a-9e7c-4da5-baee-f32b029ea2cd" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">With our free website builder, you can create any kind of website you want, including:</p>
<ul class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.wix.com/business/website" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">Business sites</u></a> - No matter what your industry, build and grow your professional presence online.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.wix.com/ecommerce/online-store" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">Online stores</u></a> - Sell products, offer subscriptions and create marketing campaigns with an all-in-one eComm solution.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.wix.com/start/blog" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">Blogs</u></a> - Let the world know what’s on your mind with an easy-to-manage blog.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.wix.com/portfolio-website" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">Portfolios</u></a> - Showcase your work with beautiful visuals and custom layouts.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.wix.com/restaurant/website" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">Restaurants</u></a> - Take reservations, display your menu and run your whole ordering system from a single place.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.wix.com/studio/enterprise" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">Enterprise corporations</u></a> - Get started with multi-site management, super-efficient site creation and everything else a big business needs.</p></li>
</ul></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__30de142a-9e7c-4da5-baee-f32b029ea2cd" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov__de08fded-dd96-49e0-bd97-a1b358cd5aef" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__de08fded-dd96-49e0-bd97-a1b358cd5aef" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32__de08fded-dd96-49e0-bd97-a1b358cd5aef" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">What makes a good website?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__de08fded-dd96-49e0-bd97-a1b358cd5aef" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__de08fded-dd96-49e0-bd97-a1b358cd5aef" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" data-bbox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" height="29" width="30" data-type="color" role=presentation aria-hidden=true aria-label="">
    <g>
        <path fill="#000624" d="M16.139 13V0h-2.167v13h-13v2.167h13v13h2.167v-13h13V13h-13Z" clip-rule="evenodd" fill-rule="evenodd" data-color="1"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</div></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__de08fded-dd96-49e0-bd97-a1b358cd5aef" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6" data-semantic-classname="button"><button type="button" class="StylableButton2545352419__root comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6-styleId__root wixui-button" data-testid="buttonContent" aria-expanded="false" aria-describedby="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32__de08fded-dd96-49e0-bd97-a1b358cd5aef" aria-label="Show more"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__container"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__label wixui-button__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Show more</span><span class="StylableButton2545352419__icon wixui-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="stylablebutton-icon"><span><svg data-bbox="20 20 160 160" viewBox="0 0 200 200" height="200" width="200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" data-type="shape">
    <g>
        <path d="M108.012 91.953L107.95 20H91.925l.062 71.953H20v16.031h71.988V180l15.963-.062.062-71.953H180V91.953h-71.988z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2__de08fded-dd96-49e0-bd97-a1b358cd5aef" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__de08fded-dd96-49e0-bd97-a1b358cd5aef" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">A good website blends beautiful design, fresh engaging content and intuitive navigation to get your visitors to take action. Take these tips into account when creating your site:</p>
<ul class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">Know your audience</strong>. Provide content that matches your visitors’ interests and answers questions they might search for online. That way, they’ll find your site easily and want to stick around. Use calls to action to guide your visitors toward the next steps you want them to take.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">Keep it clear and focused. </strong>A good website has a clear purpose, and its form and function should reflect that. Structure your content so visitors can quickly find what they need—focus each page on a single message, and make sure your voice is consistent throughout.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">Encourage engagement on all devices. </strong>Use attractive layouts and ensure buttons and links are easy to use, so visitors can seamlessly explore and interact with your site on both desktop and mobile.</p></li>
  <li class="wixui-rich-text__text"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><strong class="wixui-rich-text__text">Make it fast and easy to use. </strong>Website speed matters—for both users and search engines. A good website loads quickly on every device. Optimize images, design with mobile in mind and rely on fast cloud hosting and modern infrastructure. With Wix, features like built-in image optimization, mobile-friendly design, and a global CDN network help ensure your site loads fast and performs smoothly wherever your visitors come from.</p></li>
</ul>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><br class="wixui-rich-text__text"></p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text"><a href="https://www.wix.com/blog/what-makes-a-good-website" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">For more tips on how to make a good website, check out our blog.</u></a></p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__de08fded-dd96-49e0-bd97-a1b358cd5aef" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov__2ce4b6a4-3a43-42aa-b91a-d4fbca6457ea" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__2ce4b6a4-3a43-42aa-b91a-d4fbca6457ea" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32__2ce4b6a4-3a43-42aa-b91a-d4fbca6457ea" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">Can I create a website for free?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__2ce4b6a4-3a43-42aa-b91a-d4fbca6457ea" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__2ce4b6a4-3a43-42aa-b91a-d4fbca6457ea" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" data-bbox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" height="29" width="30" data-type="color" role=presentation aria-hidden=true aria-label="">
    <g>
        <path fill="#000624" d="M16.139 13V0h-2.167v13h-13v2.167h13v13h2.167v-13h13V13h-13Z" clip-rule="evenodd" fill-rule="evenodd" data-color="1"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</div></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__2ce4b6a4-3a43-42aa-b91a-d4fbca6457ea" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6" data-semantic-classname="button"><button type="button" class="StylableButton2545352419__root comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6-styleId__root wixui-button" data-testid="buttonContent" aria-expanded="false" aria-describedby="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32__2ce4b6a4-3a43-42aa-b91a-d4fbca6457ea" aria-label="Show more"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__container"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__label wixui-button__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Show more</span><span class="StylableButton2545352419__icon wixui-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="stylablebutton-icon"><span><svg data-bbox="20 20 160 160" viewBox="0 0 200 200" height="200" width="200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" data-type="shape">
    <g>
        <path d="M108.012 91.953L107.95 20H91.925l.062 71.953H20v16.031h71.988V180l15.963-.062.062-71.953H180V91.953h-71.988z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2__2ce4b6a4-3a43-42aa-b91a-d4fbca6457ea" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__2ce4b6a4-3a43-42aa-b91a-d4fbca6457ea" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">Yes, with Wix, creating a website is completely free. You can design your site, publish it and share it with the world without spending a dime. It’s a great way to get started and see what’s possible for your ideas.</p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">However, if you’re looking to take things to the next level—like selling products through an online store, using custom domains or removing ads—you’ll need to upgrade to one of our <a href="https://www.wix.com/plans" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">Premium plans</u></a>. These plans unlock extra features designed to help your business grow.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__2ce4b6a4-3a43-42aa-b91a-d4fbca6457ea" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov__7adb88a8-e3cd-4506-805e-e69f0d969260" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__7adb88a8-e3cd-4506-805e-e69f0d969260" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32__7adb88a8-e3cd-4506-805e-e69f0d969260" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">How much does it cost to build a website?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__7adb88a8-e3cd-4506-805e-e69f0d969260" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__7adb88a8-e3cd-4506-805e-e69f0d969260" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" data-bbox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" height="29" width="30" data-type="color" role=presentation aria-hidden=true aria-label="">
    <g>
        <path fill="#000624" d="M16.139 13V0h-2.167v13h-13v2.167h13v13h2.167v-13h13V13h-13Z" clip-rule="evenodd" fill-rule="evenodd" data-color="1"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</div></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6__7adb88a8-e3cd-4506-805e-e69f0d969260" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6" data-semantic-classname="button"><button type="button" class="StylableButton2545352419__root comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpa6-styleId__root wixui-button" data-testid="buttonContent" aria-expanded="false" aria-describedby="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32__7adb88a8-e3cd-4506-805e-e69f0d969260" aria-label="Show more"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__container"><span class="StylableButton2545352419__label wixui-button__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Show more</span><span class="StylableButton2545352419__icon wixui-button__icon" aria-hidden="true" data-testid="stylablebutton-icon"><span><svg data-bbox="20 20 160 160" viewBox="0 0 200 200" height="200" width="200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" data-type="shape">
    <g>
        <path d="M108.012 91.953L107.95 20H91.925l.062 71.953H20v16.031h71.988V180l15.963-.062.062-71.953H180V91.953h-71.988z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</span></span></span></button></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2__7adb88a8-e3cd-4506-805e-e69f0d969260" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzph2 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpl6__7adb88a8-e3cd-4506-805e-e69f0d969260" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpl6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text">The <a href="https://www.wix.com/blog/how-much-does-a-website-cost" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">cost of building a website</u></a> varies depending on the features you need and whether you opt to build it yourself with a website builder or pay a developer to build it for you. On a website builder such as Wix, you can build as many websites as you want for free, however, you’ll have to upgrade to a <a href="https://www.wix.com/plans" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">Premium plan</u></a> to connect a custom domain and get advanced business features. The cost of creating a website may be significantly higher if you don’t opt for an all-inclusive platform like Wix.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__7adb88a8-e3cd-4506-805e-e69f0d969260" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov__ad4e2602-6843-46f0-8e43-afacfd79dc0e" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__ad4e2602-6843-46f0-8e43-afacfd79dc0e" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32__ad4e2602-6843-46f0-8e43-afacfd79dc0e" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">Can I create a website without knowing how to code?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__ad4e2602-6843-46f0-8e43-afacfd79dc0e" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__ad4e2602-6843-46f0-8e43-afacfd79dc0e" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

    <g>

Wix is an intuitive <a href="https://www.wix.com/builder/no-code" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">no-code website builder</u></a> that makes it possible to create a high-quality website without knowing how to code. In the Wix Editor, you can drag and drop any feature you want and customize it to match the look and feel of your site. Of course, you have the option to add advanced functionality with code as well.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__ad4e2602-6843-46f0-8e43-afacfd79dc0e" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov__6551033d-cef2-4b9b-bcaa-5b8d2bd93e3d" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__6551033d-cef2-4b9b-bcaa-5b8d2bd93e3d" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32__6551033d-cef2-4b9b-bcaa-5b8d2bd93e3d" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">Should I use a website builder or hire a developer?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__6551033d-cef2-4b9b-bcaa-5b8d2bd93e3d" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__6551033d-cef2-4b9b-bcaa-5b8d2bd93e3d" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

However, if you are looking for expert help, you can hire a freelance web developer through the <a href="https://www.wix.com/marketplace" target="_blank" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><u class="wixui-rich-text__text">Wix Marketplace</u></a> at a cost that suits your budget.</p></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7__6551033d-cef2-4b9b-bcaa-5b8d2bd93e3d" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzpp7 aVng1S wixui-horizontal-line"></div><!--/$--></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov__1c42d4a5-5fef-49ee-b218-0388072b6ea6" role="listitem" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzov wixui-repeater__item" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-repeater__item"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3__1c42d4a5-5fef-49ee-b218-0388072b6ea6" role="" class="PiVxGu MDrwHQ comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3-container comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzoz3 wixui-box" dir="ltr"><div aria-hidden="true" class="yPXgy9 YqUfCX inner-box wixui-box"></div><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32__1c42d4a5-5fef-49ee-b218-0388072b6ea6" class="ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp32 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h3 class="font_3 wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixui-rich-text__text">Does my free website come with hosting?</span></h3></div><!--/$--><!--$--><div id="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__1c42d4a5-5fef-49ee-b218-0388072b6ea6" class="comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7 wixui-vector-image"><div data-testid="svgRoot-comp-lwhnfmu5_r_comp-lmejpzp7__1c42d4a5-5fef-49ee-b218-0388072b6ea6" class="VDJedC l4CAhn"><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" data-bbox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0.972 0 28.167 28.167" height="29" width="30" data-type="color" role=presentation aria-hidden=true aria-label="">

    <g>
        <path d="M108.012 91.953L107.95 20H91.925l.062 71.953H20v16.031h71.988V180l15.963-.062.062-71.953H180V91.953h-71.988z"/>
    </g>
